item.description: Hi there Hi, I’m Jan Steffen, an IT professional based in Oberems, Hessen, Germany. With a passion for cloud technologies and software engineering, I’ve built my career around designing and implementing robust, scalable systems. Currently, I’m a Lead IT Architect at BWI GmbH, where I’m focused on driving innovation and delivering high-quality Kubernetes solutions. Before this role, I spent nearly four years at finleap connect GmbH, holding various positions including Cloud Tech Lead, Senior Cloud Engineer, and Platform Engineer.
